A metal fab shop spent $60K on "AI quoting software."

Six months in, nobody trusted the output because it didn't know their actual steel suppliers or scrap rates.

We rebuilt it with a 300-line script that reads their real vendor sheets and historical job costs.

Same accuracy.

The "AI is replacing jobs" debate is misframed at the SMB level.
